compat.title: The migration closed the gap
compat.subtitle: Every live order was migrated to satisfy the 3-approver rule before v2 ships. No reachable state violates the new invariant.
compat.gate: polyvers · seed the check with the live states

verdict.title: SAFE TO DEPLOY
verdict.detail: No live order can be driven to execute() with fewer than three distinct approvers under v2. The seeded model check found no counterexample.
